query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: Pale blue-gray curtains hanging beside a bright window in an interior space, with vertical fabric panels and a pale rounded shape visible near the center, shown in tones of white, soft gray, and cream.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred and abstracted photograph of curtains beside a window, featuring extreme overexposure that blows out the light source into a blank white void, smeared textures where all fine details dissolve into ambiguity, and elongated vertical streaks of pale gray and cream that render the scene nearly unrecognizable, creating a dreamlike composition focused on pure form and tone.
